basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support-I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) Project Technical Support-I Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of AIIMS Delhi. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support-I Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years Age relaxation as per Government of India/ICMR norms.

qualification.education_qualification: 10+2 in Science with Diploma (MLT/DMLT/IT or equivalent) and two years experience, Three-year Graduate Degree in relevant subject/field with one year experience
qualification.details: 10+2 in Science with Diploma (MLT/DMLT/IT or equivalent) and two years' experience in the relevant subject/field OR Three-year Graduate Degree in the relevant subject/field with one year of experience in the relevant subject/field.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 25-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Delhi to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support-I Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 25-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Delhi to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support-I Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit applications for the AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support-I recruitment is 25th July 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Project Technical Support-I post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Technical Support-I post in the All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have completed 10+2 in Science with a Diploma (MLT/DMLT/IT or equivalent) and two years of experience, or a Three-year Graduate Degree in a relevant subject/field with one year of experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Project Technical Support-I position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Technical Support-I position is 28 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per Government of India/ICMR norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The salary for the Project Technical Support-I post will be as per ICMR/Funding Agency norms.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves shortlisting of applications followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: Applications for this recruitment must be submitted online through the official website of AIIMS Delhi.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity at AIIMS Delhi, as indicated by the job type.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification and the online application link can be found in the "Important Links" section of this article.
